exceptions.description: CRITICAL FIELD - The full extracted error text with complete stack traces, OpenTofu failures, and test errors. This is used downstream when writing code for the next iteration. Should include: full Python stack traces, OpenTofu diagnostic messages, AWS auth errors, test failure details. This is the same content currently stored in iteration.exceptions.

allow_goal_achieved.description: Whether logs contain blocking errors that prevent goal achievement. True if only warnings are present or no errors. False if blocking errors exist.

allow_goal_achieved_justification.description: Explanation for the allow_goal_achieved decision, detailing why the gate was blocked or allowed.

has_blocking_errors.description: True if blocking errors exist in logs (deployment failures, runtime errors, test failures). False otherwise.

has_warnings_only.description: True if only warnings exist with no blocking errors. False if there are blocking errors or no issues at all.

deployment_errors.description: List of deployment error summaries (OpenTofu plan/apply failures, build errors, etc.)

runtime_errors.description: List of runtime error summaries (CloudWatch errors, execution failures, etc.)

warnings.description: List of warning summaries (non-blocking issues that don't prevent goal achievement)

test_failures.description: List of test failure summaries with filenames and failure reasons

error_classification.description: Structured breakdown of error types for easier consumption by downstream agents
